'''Rageon Vart''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|human]] [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Mandalorian shock trooper|warrior]] and member of the [[Death Watch/Legends|Death Watch]] who lived during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
During the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], waged between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the rebellious [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], Rageon Vart was a member of the [[Death Watch/Legends|Death Watch]],<ref name="SWG:DWB" /> an ancient splinter group of Mandalorian [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]].<ref name="DWB">{{SonyCite|url=content.jsp?page=Death%20Watch%20Bunker|text=Death Watch Bunker}}</ref> Following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Vart held the position of [[Ghost (Death Watch)|Ghost]] and was stationed at the Death Watch's [[Death Watch bunker|hidden bunker]] on the [[Endor/Legends|forest moon of Endor]].<ref name="SWG:DWB" /> In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> a group of intrepid [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] associated with the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] attacked the bunker. While the facility was soon locked down, Rageon Vart was in possession of a [[Keycard/Legends|pass key]] granting access to the Section A of the Death Watch Bunker. Then, he was confronted by at least one individual seeking entrance to the depths of the base, and was eventually [[Death/Legends|killed]] for his pass key.<ref name="SWG:DWB" />

==Equipment==
Rageon Vart, as a Mandalorian [[Soldier/Legends|soldier]], wore a dark gray-[[Color/Legends|colored]] [[Mandalorian armor/Legends|Mandalorian armor]]<ref name="SWG:DWB" /> made from [[alum]] metal.<ref name="DWB" /> His helmet was equipped with a mounted [[Rangefinder/Legends|rangefinder]], and [[color/Legends|yellow]] trim outlined his [[Heads-up display/Legends|HUD]]-equipped visor. In addition, he wore heavy combat [[Boot/Legends|boots]]. During his time at the Death Watch's bunker on Endor, the Ghost made use of a [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifle]] as a weapon.<ref name="SWG:DWB" />

==Behind the scenes==
Rageon Vart was a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Roleplaying game|massively multiplayer online role-playing game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:DWB" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Rageon Vart was added to the game along with the Death Watch Bunker through an [[W:c:swg:Update Notes: 25 May 04|update]] released on [[May 25]], [[2004]].<ref name="SonyCite-Publish 8: Droids Rebuilt">{{SonyCite|url=recent_updates.jsp?o=61943|text=Publish 8: Droids Rebuilt}}</ref>
